description: Use this API to add the files currently being tracked. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariotrackfileadd(sgroup, nfiles, indexes, discard)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group to add tracked file to. (input; current active group by default).

parameters.name: nfiles
parameters.description: Number of files currently being tracked to add. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: indexes
parameters.description: An array of NFILES elements specifying indexes of the files to add based on the list from SCENARIOTRACKFILEADD. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: discard
parameters.description: A flag to specify whether or not to discard the files being tracked that were not added. (input; FALSE by default).
